creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bsam
Date: Wed Sep 19 13:38:21 2012
New Revision: 304515
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304515

Log:
  Add trytond_stock_supply_day 2.4.0, tryton Application Platform (Stock
  Supply Day Module).
  
  PR:		ports/171443
  Submitted by:	matthias@petermann.it

Added:
  head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_day/
  head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_day/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_day/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_day/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_day/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 13:36:55 2012	(r304514)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 13:38:21 2012	(r304515)
@@ -144,6 +144,7 @@
     SUBDIR += trytond_stock_product_location
     SUBDIR += trytond_stock_split
     SUBDIR += trytond_stock_supply
+    SUBDIR += trytond_stock_supply_day
     SUBDIR += trytond_timesheet
     SUBDIR += venice
     SUBDIR += weberp

Added: head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_day/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_day/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 13:38:21 2012	(r304515)
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+# Created by: Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_stock_supply_day
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.0
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	Tryton Application Platform (Stock Supply Day Module)
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_purchase>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_purchase
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_day/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_day/distinfo	Wed Sep 19 13:38:21 2012	(r304515)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_stock_supply_day-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 70d4209873eae798b1a9639277d059d949b1313753ab46c1c7bf3baf90a58601
+SIZE (trytond_stock_supply_day-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 21744

Added: head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_day/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_day/pkg-descr	Wed Sep 19 13:38:21 2012	(r304515)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+This port adds the Stock Supply Day Module to the Tryton Application Platform.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/

Added: head/finance/trytond_stock_supply_day/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
